0.title: WHMCS ↔ Bexio Integration Documentation
0.content: Welcome to the documentation for the WHMCS ↔ Bexio Integration. This documentation provides comprehensive guidance on integrating WHMCS with Bexio to streamline your business processes and enhance efficiency.

1.title: Overview
1.content: The WHMCS ↔ Bexio Integration enables seamless synchronization between your WHMCS system and Bexio, including customers, invoices, products, and more.
